response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed. The song title "ただ声一つ" (Tada Koe Hitotsu) was visible in the top left corner. The artist was identified as Rokudenashi via a web search of the song title. The performer, Murasaki Shion, was identified from the video context (hashtag #紫咲シオン卒業LIVE). Lyrics were retrieved using the search query ' "Tada Koe Hitotsu" Rokudenashi Japanese and English lyrics '. The performance ends at 02:18, followed by a speaking segment.
response.global_summary: A live performance by VTuber Murasaki Shion, where she sings "Tada Koe Hitotsu" by Rokudenashi, followed by a brief dialogue segment.

scenes.description: Murasaki Shion performs "Tada Koe Hitotsu" on a stage with a virtual concert setting. On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
つづく時間の欠片を集めている
ただ過ぎるノートの余白に書く
「答えは、いつ？」
ほんのり小さな感情へ
愛をひとつ またね またね
夜に咲く温度と灯るまで
呼吸ひとつ 生きる 生きる
優しい日々の横で泣かぬように
あぁ 泣かぬように
ちっちゃな言葉 チクチクしたの
キリが無いけどさ
それを忘れたふり 疲れたよ
夜よ抱きしめて
今日だって笑う 笑う
泣いちゃう僕を隠すために笑う
言えないことは 言わないで良い
と思えたら軽くなれるのかな
愛をひとつ またね またね
夜に咲く温度と灯るまで
呼吸ひとつ 生きる 生きる
優しい日々の横で泣かぬように
吐き出す気持ちは簡単だけど
でも生きるの難易度高すぎて
どうにも解けない問いだらけ
さっぱり 記っ記り 前向いて
なんてしなくて良いから抱きしめて
愛をひとつ またね またね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Gathering fragments of time that continue
Just on the blank pages of the overflowing notebook
"When will the answer be written?"
To the faint little emotion
Just one love; see you again, see you again
Until the temperature blooming in the night illuminates
Just one breath, I live, I live
Beside the gentle days, so as not to cry
Ah, so as not to cry
Tiny words made me prickle
Though there is no end to them...
I pretended to forget, I was tired
Night, hold me tight
Even if I laugh, laugh today
To hide the me who wants to cry
It's fine not to say things I can't say
If I could think that, I might become lighter
Just one love; see you again, see you again
Until the temperature blooming in the night illuminates
Just one breath, I live, I live
Beside the gentle days, so as not to cry
I let out my simple emotions
But living is too challenging
Too many unsolvable problems
No need to forget and face forward
All you need to do is hold me
Just one love; see you again, see you again.

scenes.description: The performance ends, and Murasaki Shion talks about the guest/solo performance part of her live stream.
